page_title: Self-Help Tools | Pine Tree Legal Assistance
evidence_snippet: Pine Tree Legal Assistance states that it provides free civil legal aid in Maine and preserves statewide legal-help topics including rental housing, money and debt, health and public benefits, domestic violence, and divorce and family matters.
review_notes: The homepage itself is sufficient because it explicitly states free civil legal aid in Maine and exposes statewide help topics.
This is stronger statewide legal-aid proof than a bar referral or a single project page.
